message:
feat(conformance): add FR-P2C-008 expire/evict differential conformance tests and user journey corpus

Implemented packet FR-P2C-008 conformance coverage for the expire/evict
command surface with differential mode-split testing comparing strict vs
hardened execution paths. Added golden JSONL log contracts, contract
tables, and risk notes for packet 008. Introduced expire/evict user
journey fixture and expanded the user workflow corpus with new scenarios.
Updated the user_journey_corpus_gate binary and conformance lib to
support the expanded test surface. Updated legacy analysis and Redis
structure documentation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
